task_completion.description: Verify that the Weasis viewer application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis medical viewer application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that DICOM images are loaded into the Weasis viewer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis interface shows medical images loaded, typically visible in the thumbnail or series explorer panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the layout is changed to a two-panel side-by-side (1 row x 2 columns) configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main viewing area of Weasis is divided vertically into exactly two panels side-by-side.

task_completion.description: Verify that DICOM image content is displayed in the left panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A medical/DICOM image is clearly visible inside the left panel of the split layout.

task_completion.description: Verify that DICOM image content is displayed in the right panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A medical/DICOM image is clearly visible inside the right panel of the split layout.

task_completion.description: Verify that a screenshot of the layout was saved to ~/DICOM/exports/split_view.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or save dialog showing a file named 'split_view.png' successfully saved or located in the '~/DICOM/exports/' (or '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/') directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the layout change was performed using the actual Weasis application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The layout change should be visible within the Weasis GUI, showing genuine interaction with the software's layout controls rather than a mocked image.

integrity.description: Ensure the images displayed are actual DICOM medical scans.
integrity.visual_evidence: The images in the panels must look like real medical scans (e.g., X-rays, MRIs, CTs), not random pictures, text files, or blank placeholders.

integrity.description: Ensure the screenshot was actually captured and saved as an image file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of a screen capture tool being used or a valid image save process, rather than just creating an empty file using terminal commands like 'touch split_view.png'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path for the screenshot is exactly /home/ga/DICOM/exports/split_view.png. The environment uses real DICOM samples from Rubo Medical.
